source_pr.title: domain,owner: unify and normalize the format of the log
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
Unify and normalize the format of the log in the pkg of domain and owner.

### What is changed and how it works?

Change `log "github.com/sirupsen/logrus"` to `github.com/pingcap/log`.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->


Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR/patch looks like a correctness/refactor/feature change without a concrete flaky failure signature or a targeted stabilization for the picked test. Keep as insufficient evidence until CI logs or a reliable repro is available.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
